case_title: BRADSHAW & ASSOCIATES, P.C. VS. DAVID LOUIE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRADSHAW & ASSOCIATES, P.C.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-14-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIE, DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-21-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM ALAN SILVERMAN; CLERK;S. VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIE, DAVID
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,450.00 FILED BY BRADSHAW & ASSOCIATES, P.C. AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIE, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRADSHAW & ASSOCIATES, P.C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOUIE, DAVID $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $550.00, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PRODUCE FEE AGREEMENT ON DEED OF TRUST CASE. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PRODUCE EVIDENCE ON OUTRAGEOUS DEED OF TRUST CASE. PLAINTIFF CHARGES OF $175/HR FOR PARALEGAL, $345 FOR ASSOCIATE AND, $475 FOR PRINCIPAL EXCESSIVE IN LIGHT OF WORK PERFORMED IN THIS MATTER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
